must_have_quals: Bachelor degree in computer science or a related technical discipline, Experience working with Android/Java/Objective-C/Python/Golang

job_summary: ByteDance is a company that inspires creativity and enriches life through its innovative products. They are seeking a Software Engineer to join their R&D Services team, where the main responsibilities include building development infrastructure and advanced intelligent data platforms to enhance user experience.
